title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: The video commemorates the 10th anniversary of AlphaGo's victory over Lee Sedol in March 2016, positioning it as the catalyst for the modern AI revolution. Speakers from Google DeepMind reflect on how AlphaGo's success with reinforcement learning led to foundational breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
